meta.title: Paraglider Revision & Repair
meta.description: Over 30 years of experience in inspection, maintenance and repair of paraglider and paramotor wings. ParachecK® certified workshop in Seine-et-Marne.

banner.baseline:
Inspection, maintenance, and repair of paragliding and paramotor wings.
Expertise and know-how dedicated to your safety.

heroImage.alt: Paragliding wing being serviced in the atelier

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Complete care for your paragliding and paramotor wings.

maintenance.title: Periodic inspection
maintenance.description: Periodic control and full inspection of your paragliding and paramotor wings, carried out following the procedures and recommendations of the manufacturers.

repair.title: Repair
repair.description: Tears, rips, line or seam damage: each wing is carefully evaluated to provide a suitable, durable repair that meets safety standards.

parachutePacking.title: Reserve parachute packing
parachutePacking.description: Aeration, ventilation, and packing of your reserve parachute according to manufacturer specifications, ensuring optimal functionality in emergency situations.

profile.quote: I have been inspecting wings for over 30 years. Formerly based in Paris at VLD (Vol Libre Diffusion), my atelier is now located in Seine-et-Marne for {{yearsSinceCreation}} years where I bring my experience to your service. Passionate about everything that flies, I maintain your paragliding and paramotor wings.

image.alt: Portrait of Christophe, founder of Atelier d'Ailes

experience.title: A career dedicated to your wings

atelier.title: Atelier d’ailes
atelier.description:
Inspection, maintenance, and repair of paragliding and paramotor wings.
Each wing is personally handled with a rigorous and artisanal approach.
Experience gained over the years allows for precise diagnostics and tailored interventions.

vld.title: Vol Libre Diffusion (VLD)
vld.description:
Wing inspection and maintenance at VLD shop in Paris.
Daily work on wings from various manufacturers and uses.
Extensive technical experience gained directly from pilots.

paracheck.title: ParachecK® Certified
paracheck.description: The atelier adheres to the [ParachecK® charter](https://parapente.ffvl.fr/sites/parapente.ffvl.fr/files/Charte%20FFVL%20ParachecK%20V2_03.pdf) of the [FFVL](https://federation.ffvl.fr/), ensuring inspections meet official standards.

maintenance.title: ParachecK® Periodic Inspection
maintenance.description: The [ParachecK® Periodic Inspection](https://parapente.ffvl.fr/revision-voiles) is the most complete check to assess the actual condition of your wing: fabric porosity and strength, line tension, alignment, and thorough visual inspection. A detailed report is provided according to the charter specifications.

security.title: Standards and safety
security.description: Only this inspection, required by the [EN 926-2](https://parapente.ffvl.fr/sites/parapente.ffvl.fr/files/Norme%20CEN%20-%20pr%C3%A9sentation%20EN%20926-2%20cF06%20modif%20AD_0.pdf) standard, informs you with certainty of your wing's ability to fly safely at a given time. It is also recommended when buying or selling a second-hand wing.

testimonials.name: Thierry G.
testimonials.testimonial: High-quality work done by a passionate professional. I felt confident flying under my wing repaired by him. You might have to wait a bit, but serious work that I recommend.

testimonials.name: Henriette H.
testimonials.testimonial: Great contact, meticulous and high-quality work. Christophe takes the time to explain his interventions. Solo wing and reserve parachute inspected with complete confidence.

testimonials.name: Client
testimonials.testimonial: Expertise and know-how built over a long experience. Meticulous work and great mastery. Undoubtedly a reference.
